note: All endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <token>. File uploads must use multipart/form-data. Transcription and TTS run asynchronously via BullMQ — the HTTP response returns immediately after the message is persisted and broadcast.

endpoints.summary: Upload a voice file. The file is stored on Cloudinary, a VOICE message is created in the room, the room is notified, and a background transcription job is queued. Returns immediately without waiting for transcription.

file.description: Audio or video file to transcribe.

roomId.description: ID of the room the voice message belongs to.

201.description: Voice message created. Transcription is in progress — listen for 'voice_transcribed' on the WebSocket.

400.description: Invalid file type or file exceeds 10 MB.

asyncEvents.note: After the HTTP response, the following WebSocket events may be emitted to the room.

payload.transcript: The transcribed text of the audio

voice_transcribed.description: Fired when Whisper transcription completes. Update the message content in the UI.

ai_thinking.description: Fired only if the transcript starts with '@ai'. Signals that an AI response is being generated.

ai_token.description: Streamed token from the AI response (voice @ai only).

ai_response_complete.description: AI response fully streamed and persisted. Swap the temp bubble.

ai_audio_ready.description: TTS audio for the AI response is ready (voice-triggered AI only). Render an audio player.
